notes.en: Reaction DPS [[character:dehya]] uses her [[ability:skill]] to trigger reactions like [[element:overload]] or [[element:burgeon]] while off field.
notes.fr: [[character:dehya]] DPS Réactions utilise son [[ability:skill]] pour déclencher des réactions comme [[element:overload]] ou [[element:burgeon]] en étant off field.
notes.it: [[character:dehya]] DPS da Reazione utilizza la sua [[ability:skill]] per provocare reazioni come [[element:overload]] o [[element:burgeon]] da fuori campo.
notes.ru: В этом варианте [[character:dehya]] использует свой [[ability:skill]] для активации [[element:overload|Перегрузки]] или [[element:burgeon|Цветения]].

notes.en: Since [[character:dehya]] does not need her [[ability:burst]] to trigger reactions, she doesn't need to build [[stat:er]].
notes.fr: Puisque [[character:dehya]] n'a pas besoin de son [[ability:burst]] pour déclencher des réactions, elle n'a pas besoin de [[stat:er]].
notes.it: Poiché [[character:dehya]] non ha bisogno del suo [[ability:burst]] per provocare reazioni, non ha bisogno di [[stat:er]].
notes.ru: Поскольку [[ability:burst]] в этой сборке не используется для закрытия реакций, уровень [[stat:er|ВЭ]] не имеет значения.
